jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at ICAT
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
